name: Hanky Panky Squares
recipeIngredient: 1 lb soft Cheddar cheese, cut in blocks
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the sausage and drain on paper towels.
2. In a large frying pan, saute the ground beef and drain.
3. Combine the sausage and cheese with the ground beef and cook until the cheese is melted.
4. Add Worcestershire sauce, oregano, salt, pepper, garlic powder, and blend well.
5. Spread the mixture on cocktail rye and sprinkle shredded Mozzarella on top.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes. These can be made ahead and frozen. Bake for 12 minutes if frozen.
